title: VP, Engineering
jd:
POSITION: VP, Engineering at TestCorp.

We are seeking a Vice President of Engineering to lead a globally distributed engineering organization. The role focuses on engineering operations, developer experience, AI-augmented workflows, and scaling engineering practices across multiple product lines.

Responsibilities:
- Lead 100+ engineers across distributed teams
- Establish DORA metrics and engineering quality cadences
- Govern multi-million-dollar vendor portfolio for LLM providers, observability tools, and data integration partners
- Drive AI-augmented development practices including AI-assisted code review and automated triage
- Build hiring framework, leveling structure, and onboarding automation
- Partner with C-suite on engineering strategy and cross-functional alignment

Qualifications:
- 15+ years software engineering, 7+ in technical leadership
- Track record of scaling engineering organizations
- Experience with AI tooling adoption and developer productivity metrics
- Audit-ready governance experience in regulated environments
- Strong stakeholder communication including executive presentations
submitNote: Submitted via test cycle — synthetic posting, no real ATS hit.
